steps.title: Identify the key characterization
steps.content: The passage explicitly describes the excavation work as taking “weeks or even months of hard, physically tiring” effort — this single detail defines what the process is like.

steps.title: Select the word that fits
steps.content:
The blank needs to describe the excavation process — the passage says it takes weeks or months of hard, physically tiring work. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — cheap: "Excavating a giganotosaur fossil is a cheap process" — cheap means low-cost. The passage says nothing about cost; it emphasizes physical effort and time. ✗
  • Choice B — difficult: "Excavating a giganotosaur fossil is a difficult process" — difficult means demanding and hard. Weeks or months of hard, physically tiring work is exactly a difficult process. ✓
  • Choice C — rapid: "Excavating a giganotosaur fossil is a rapid process" — rapid means fast. The passage says it takes weeks or months, directly contradicting rapid. ✗
  • Choice D — common: "Excavating a giganotosaur fossil is a common process" — common means frequent or ordinary. The passage says nothing about how often excavations happen. ✗
B is correct.
